RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION.
